ocr_findings.description: The 'この章のポイント！' label on the monitor graphic and the dog mascot image are represented as image placeholders. The label text 'ここに注目して読もう！' is preserved in OCR text. No meaningful content loss.
The arrow annotation '← 本章はここ！' in the table is captured as plain text '本章はここ！' at the end of the table block, losing the arrow symbol. Low severity.

reviewer_notes: Chapter 7 (第7章) title page for プロジェクトマネジメント. Large chapter heading, brief intro paragraph, syllabus bullet points, IPA URL citation, and a 3×9 subject-area positioning table are all faithfully reproduced. The table structure (ストラテジ系/マネジメント系/テクノロジ系 with 大分類 entries) is correctly captured. Confirmed chapter_title as label: dominant heading with limited body text.
